Surface Studio 2+ for Business: All-in-one touchscreen desktop

Stand-out design, fluid productivity

Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one computer that commands attention.

Stand-out design, fluid productivity

Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one computer that commands attention.

Surface Studio 2+

An all-in-one that adapts to you

Watch video

Make an impact

Pause
Previous Next

Multitasking is a breeze

Lead video calls and fly through presentations with ease on an 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor.

Empower creativity

Build in 3D1 and achieve realistic ray-traced graphics with the NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 3060 dGPU.

Modern connections

Create your ultimate workspace with a variety of essential ports, including USB-C with Thunderbolt™ 4.

Immersive video calls

Be seen with an enhanced 1080p HD camera that renders the true you, even in low lighting conditions.

Express your ideas without limits

Transform your space from desktop to digital canvas to work with digital pen on a vibrant 28-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen display. With the 3:2 aspect ratio, you get 13% more screen space than a typical display.2

Make it work for you

More screen, more productivity
Work in up to 4 apps side-by-side with Windows 11 snap layouts.
Next-level 3D
Add dimension to your designs with blazing-fast graphics.
Build something big
Interact with touch. Edit with a pen. See it all on the big screen.
Richer online meetings
Be heard with Dual Studio Mics, and seen in a crisp, high-res image.

Amazing views from any angle

Slide to rotate

Explore what’s inside

Explore the tech specs that enable sleek versatility, brilliant color and blazing-fast graphics on a stunning all in one business computer with a 28-inch PixelSense™ touch display.
...
Tech specs
Processor
11th Gen Intel® Core™ i7-11370H Processor
Graphics
NVIDIA® GeForce RTX™ 3060 Laptop GPU with 6GB GDDR6 GPU memory
Memory and storage3
  • 32GB (DDR4)
  • 1TB solid-state drive (SSD)
Display
  • Screen: 28-inch PixelSense™ Display
  • Touch: 10-point multi-touch
  • Aspect Ratio: 3:2
  • Resolution: 4500 x 3000 (192 PPI)
  • Color profile: sRGB and Vivid
  • Individually color-calibrated display
  • 1 billion colors and better gradients with Auto Color Management
  • Contrast ratio 1200:1
  • Dolby Vision® support4
  • Gorilla® Glass 3
  • Brightness: 500 nits (typical), 12 nits (minimum)
Size and Weight

Base:
 

  • Length: 9.8 inch (250 mm)
  • Width: 8.7 inch (220 mm)
  • Thickness: 1.2 inch (31.45 mm)

Display:
 

  • Length: 25.1 inch (637.35 mm)
  • Width: 0.5 inch (12.5 mm)
  • Height: 17.3 inch (438.90 mm)
  • Weight: 21 lbs max (9.56 kg max)
Security
  • TPM 2.0 chip for enterprise-grade security and BitLocker support
  • Enterprise-grade protection with Windows Hello face sign-in
  • Windows 11 Secured-core PC
Cameras
  • Front Facing Windows Hello face authentication camera
  • 1080p Full HD front facing camera
Audio
  • Dual far-field Studio Mics
  • Stereo 2.1 speakers with Dolby Atmos®5
Ports
  • 3 x USB-C® with USB 4.0/Thunderbolt™ 4 (Native external display support: Up to three 4K UHD @60Hz)
  • 2 x USB-A 3.1
  • 3.5 mm headphone jack
  • 1 Gigabit Ethernet port
Network and connectivity
  • Wi-Fi 6: 802.11ax compatible
  • Bluetooth® Wireless 5.1 technology
Pen & accessories compatibility

Pen Support
 

  • Designed for Surface Pen
  • Integrated magnetic storage with Surface Pen
  • Supports Microsoft Pen Protocol (MPP)

Accessories Support

  • In-box accessories come pre-paired
Software
  • Windows 11 Pro
  • Preloaded Microsoft 365 Apps1
  • Microsoft 365 Business Standard, Microsoft 365 Business Premium, or Microsoft 365 Apps 30-day trial6
Accessibility
  • Compatible with Surface Adaptive Kit
  • Compatible with Microsoft adaptive accessories
  • Include Windows Accessibility Feature – Learn More Accessibility Features | Microsoft Accessibility
  • Discover more Microsoft Accessible Devices & Products - Accessible Devices & Products for PC & Gaming | Assistive Tech Accessories - Microsoft Store
Serviceability8

Replaceable components include:

 

  • Display
  • Motherboard
  • Thermals
  • PSU
  • Feet
  • C-cover
  • Hinge cover
  • SSD
Exterior
  • Physical buttons: Volume, Power
  • Zero Gravity Hinge
What's in the box
  • Surface Studio 2+
  • Surface Pen
  • Surface Keyboard
  • Surface Mouse
  • Power cord with grip-release cable
  • Quick Start Guide
  • Safety and warranty guide
Keyboard layout
  • Activation: Moving keys
  • Layout: QWERTY, full row of function keys (F1 – F12)
  • Windows key and dedicated buttons for media controls, screen brightness
Warranty
1-year limited hardware warranty9
Sustainability7
  • Meets ENERGY STAR® requirements
  • Registered EPEAT® Gold in the US and Canada
  • Sustainable Products & Solutions | Microsoft CSR

Deploy, manage, and stay secure anywhere

  • Secured-core PCs

    The most secure Windows 11 devices for workers handling the most sensitive data.
    Learn more

  • Replaceable components

    Major components including the display, motherboard, thermals, PSU, feet, c-cover, hinge cover, and SSD are replaceable.7
    Learn more

  • Cloud-first management

    Deploy and manage down to the firmware layer through the cloud with Microsoft Endpoint Manager1 and DFCI.10
    Learn more

  • Removable hard drive

    Maintain control of your sensitive information with a removable hard drive8 for data retention.
    Learn more

Surface with Windows 11.

Windows 11
Intuitive to use, easy for IT, secure for all. That’s the power of Windows 11 Pro and Surface together. Unlock your organization’s full potential.
Learn more

  • Designed for the modern workplace

    The Surface for Business portfolio delivers experiences employees love with the choice and flexibility they need to work on their terms.

    Where to buy Compare devices
  • New

    Surface Pro for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.49

    Fast, workday-ready performance powered by the next-gen Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3), with built-in AI and optional 5G for productivity anywhere.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen with optional OLED
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Pro
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13.8 and 15-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,949.99

    Reliable Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance with on-device AI, plus an integrated privacy screen on select models for added security.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Integrated privacy screen on select models
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop
  • New

    Surface Laptop for Business, 13-inch | Intel

    Starting at $1,499.99

    Powerful AI productivity in a lightweight laptop with the latest Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3) performance.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 3)
    • AI experiences powered by a dedicated NPU
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    • All-day battery life
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 12-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,199.99

    The ultra-portable, powerful, and flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for lightning-fast performance and enhanced AI experiences.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 12-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,299.99

    Powerful, intelligent, and ultra-portable laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences and fast performance.

    • Snapdragon® X Plus processor
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch (11th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    The versatile 2-in-1 PC designed to boost productivity with exceptional performance and powerful AI capabilities.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • AI-enhanced communication
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Long battery life
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch (7th Ed.) | Intel

    Starting at $1,699.99

    Built for business, with powerful AI capabilities, exceptional performance and long battery life.

    • Intel® Core™ Ultra processor (Series 2)
    • Powerful NPU to drive PC experiences
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity on 13.8-inch
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Pro, 13-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    The flexible 2-in-1 PC designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    • Optional 5G connectivity
    Meet Surface Pro

  • Surface Laptop, 13.8 and 15-inch | Snapdragon

    Starting at $1,449.99

    Ultra-thin laptop designed for enhanced AI experiences, with industry leading AI acceleration to unlock powerful new features.

    • Snapdragon® X Elite and Plus processors
    • Exceptional battery life
    • 13.8-inch or 15-inch PixelSense™ Flow touchscreen
    Meet Surface Laptop

  • Surface Studio 2+

    Starting at $4,499.99

    Find fuel for inspiration on a sleek, versatile all-in-one device that commands attention.

    • 28-inch touchscreen display
    • 11th Gen Intel® Core™ H-35 Processor
    • NVIDIA® GeForce RTX 3060 dGPU
    Meet Surface Studio 2+

  • Surface Hub 3

    An all-in-one digital whiteboard, meetings platform, and collaborative computing device.

    • 50-inch display for smaller spaces
    • 85-inch display for larger rooms
    Meet Surface Hub 3
  • Where to buy
  • Surface blog
  • Power cord recall
  • [1] Sold separately. Software license required for some features. Requires license or subscription (sold separately) to activate and use.
  • [2] Comparison of viewable content on Surface desktop monitor with 3:2 aspect ratio versus a. 28-inch monitor with 16:9 aspect ratio.
  • [3] System software uses significant storage space. Available storage is subject to change based on system software updates and apps usage. 1GB = 1 billion bytes. 1TB = 1,000GB. See Surface.com/Storage for more details.
  • [4] Requires Dolby Vision® encoded content and video.
  • [5] Requires Dolby Atmos® encoded content and audio.
  • [6] Activation required. If your device is managed by your organization’s IT department, contact your IT administrator for activation. If you activate your trial outside your organization, after 30 days, you will be charged the applicable monthly or annual subscription fee. Credit card required. Cancel any time to stop future charges. See https://aka.ms/m365businesstrialinfo.
  • [7] For more information on registration in other markets check - Download Eco Profiles from Official Microsoft Download Center.
  • [8] Customer Replaceable Units (CRUs) are components available for purchase through your Surface Commercial Authorized Device Reseller. Components can be replaced on-site by a skilled technician following Microsoft’s Service Guide. Opening and/or repairing your device can present electric shock, fire and personal injury risks and other hazards. Use caution if undertaking do-it-yourself repairs. Device damage caused during repair will not be covered under Microsoft’s Hardware Warranty or protection plans. Components will be available shortly after initial launch; timing of availability varies by component and market.
  • [9] Microsoft’s Limited Warranty is in addition to your consumer law rights.
  • [10] Surface Go and Surface Go 2 use a third-party UEFI and do not support DFCI. Find out more about managing Surface UEFI settings and Surface devices on which DFCI is enabled.
